description_long: This is a mid-sized passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic commercial design. The aircraft features a pair of straight, low-mounted wings with visible propeller engines mounted on each wing. The fuselage is painted primarily in light gray with dark blue and red accent stripes running along the length, and the windows are arranged in a single row on each side. The tail section has a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the vertical fin adorned with matching accent stripes. The landing gear is visible and appears to be of the tricycle type, with a nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the pilots.
description: A mid-sized, light gray passenger airplane with low-mounted straight wings, twin propeller engines, and a conventional tail. It features a forward cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and blue and red accent stripes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, row of passenger windows, propeller engine, and tail design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wingspan, twin engines, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the fuselage, windows, and propeller engine, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, both propeller engines, and the tricycle landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
